text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title and author list as cited. DBLP, Semantic Scholar, and OpenReview all confirm it under arXiv ID 2310.02255, with authors Pan Lu, Hritik Bansal, Tony Xia, Jiacheng Liu, Chunyuan Li, Hannaneh Hajishirzi, Hao Cheng, Kai-Wei Chang, Michel Galley, and Jianfeng Gao — perfectly matching the reference. The automated checker's "Incorrect ArXiv ID" flag appears to be a false positive, as multiple independent sources confirm the paper at that exact ID.
LINK: https://dblp.org/rec/journals/corr/abs-2310-02255.html
